$schema: Update alongside platform-completeness-tracker.md. Percentages reflect the last verified pass, grounded in verification RPCs and the test suite.

remaining: change orders schema drift (title vs number column) — fixed 2026-07-19
Reconciliation Progress ring shows 0% instead of 'ahead of billing' when collected > billed
Committed Cost Index has no upper-bound guard for $0-contract denominators
mobile table CSS override collapses Generator Units/Unit Margin columns
get_holdings_balance_sheet RPC is wired into Reports and Assets & Deals but never imported into HoldingsHQ.tsx — /finance/dashboard shows no financial-position section for Holdings
AP aging depends on unpaid-bill logging discipline
Checks page KPI counts 'cleared' as reconciled while row badges show 'unreconciled' — same-page contradiction

workflows.note: fixed 2026-07-19 — EntityContext no longer depends on an independent, failure-prone supabase.auth.getUser() network call; a transient failure previously silently defaulted the whole session to Houston Enterprise, live-reproduced mislabeling a real HGP transaction. Stress-tested with the endpoint fully blocked across 3 reloads.

remaining: global .finance-mobile-surface .overflow-x-auto * { min-width:0 } rule (src/index.css:143-166) sits outside any @layer and beats Tailwind's min-w-[...] escape hatch, collapsing CSS-grid table columns to illegible widths on mobile
TxnPage.tsx (Income + Expenses, all 3 entities) has no pagination at all — Holdings' 430-row Income screen renders one ~23,000px page
Holdings HQ dashboard Note Schedule (148 rows) and Assets & Deals register also fully unpaginated (~10,000px each)
production build emits a single 7.9MB/2.1MB-gzip JS chunk, no code-splitting
PDF sources need photographing (vision API is image-only)
workflows.verification: scanReceipt + vendor/project match + linked document (needs VITE_OPENAI_API_KEY)

workflows.note: verified end-to-end live 2026-07-19: keyboard-shortcut capture, screenshot, admin-only Help Requests tab, lightbox — cold-start confirmed working, not just present in source

fixed 2026-07-19 — live `change_orders` table used column `number`, code inserted/selected `title` (schema drift vs. migration 20260711000001's CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS, which no-oped against a pre-existing table). Admin.tsx silently showed false success and auto-messaged the client on every failed insert; PortalPayments.tsx's Payments panel silently rendered empty. Fixed in both files, verified live with no console errors and a persisted row.

fixed 2026-07-19 — admin_read_changelog RLS policy queried auth.users directly (42501 permission denied on every SELECT since the table's creation). Inserts worked, so ~500 rows were accumulating unreadable. Fixed via migration 20260719000003_changelog_rls_repair.sql to match the working INSERT policy's auth.uid() IS NOT NULL pattern.

deferred.foundation: controls module is enabled for all 3 entities, but FinanceControls.tsx hardcodes construction copy and its WIP widget reads the HE-shaped projects table

test_battery.eslint: clean (1 pre-existing unrelated prefer-const error, ProjectManager.tsx:1075, not from this pass)
test_battery.build: clean (single 7.9MB/2.1MB-gzip JS chunk — no code-splitting, see performance-scaling)

playwright.note: no full suite run this pass — 3 parallel live-crawl agents drove every route manually via Playwright instead; all temp specs/screenshots cleaned up afterward

verify_rpcs.note: re-probed live via Supabase Management API 2026-07-19, all ok=true, including 2 new migrations from this pass
